title: Miss Circle Ender
body:
# **Miss Circle in Minecraft**
Inspired by Fundamental Paper Education.

**(Optifine Required)**
## **Tweaks**
New Enderman model

Custom  Enderman sounds

Changes the textures of Ender Pearl and Eye of Ender

## **Tutorial**
Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, it's recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead
